{{CargoRelic
|name=Owl Brother's Badge
|class_id=20459
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=Owl Brother's original name is Garcia. He was once a police officer, and that was when he was given the badge. He was later ordered to work as an undercover agent in a mafia. The badge was carefully put away and has witnessed his double life and all the dangers that he overcame.
|fame=29
|art=12
|fth=19
|civ=18
|tech=10
|ss1=When you defeat Agents, gain +1% W-tads<br>Per Agent defeated, Snail ATK +1<br>Agents Defeated: 30/30
|ss2=When you defeat Agents, gain +2% W-tads<br>Per Agent defeated, Snail ATK +2<br>Agents Defeated: 30/30
|ss3=When you defeat Agents, gain +3% W-tads<br>Per Agent defeated, Snail ATK +3<br>Agents Defeated: 30/30
|ss4=When you defeat Agents, gain +3% W-tads<br>Per Agent defeated, Snail ATK +3<br>Agents Defeated: 30/30
|ss7=When you defeat Agents, gain +3% W-tads<br>Per Agent defeated, Snail ATK +3<br>Agents Defeated: 30/30<br> (Awakened)
}}
